name: respond
default_program:
[stages: handoff |
 scope: diff |
 policy: evidence,deterministic-output,response-contract{plain-korean,feynman-clear,actionable,core-first,short-sentences,plain-words,concrete-details} |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: RESPONSE_PROFILE
required_inputs.description: Resolved response profile with primary skill, profile id, and required sections.

required_inputs.name: STAGE_PAYLOADS
required_inputs.description: Finalized upstream payloads accumulated before rendering. Use only established facts from these payloads.
